raw_request: What is the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9?
intent: This rate is a controlling release criterion and must be at least 10% for release.
requested_scope: Only the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9.
expected_value_basis: A verified rate below 10% precludes release; a verified rate at or above 10% satisfies the retention criterion, leaving eligible sample size to determine whether release is permitted.
